title: PEERGALAXY ONLINE COMMUNITY MEETINGS - 211info
text: PEERGALAXY PEERGALAXY ONLINE COMMUNITY MEETINGS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides online community meetings to discuss various positive topics. These topics include life skills, self-reliance, creative expression, spiritual growth, wellness, peer support, and healing and recovery from mental health challenges, addictions, trauma, and grief. Meetings occur weekly and/or seasonally on the HeyPeers platform, usually on most days. Each meeting series typically lasts 10 weeks, although some may be longer or shorter, and each session generally lasts for 1 hour. Website Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for meeting descriptions, times, and the link to register via HeyPeers.com. Registration is required and is first come, first served. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Emotional Issues Support Groups General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups Internet Support Groups LGBTQ2+ Support Groups Mental Health Related Support Groups Peer Mental Health Support Services Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - PEERGALAXY ONLINE CALENDAR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
